message:
fix(orchestrator): isolate per-extension LLR state and separate attempt counter from execution counter

- Replace single last_cumulative_llr_millionths scalar with
  last_cumulative_llr_by_extension BTreeMap so that optimal stopping
  LLR deltas are computed per-extension rather than leaking cumulative
  state across unrelated extensions
- Add dedicated attempt_counter (incremented on every execute() call)
  separate from execution_counter to provide stable monotonic trace/
  decision IDs and timestamp_us values for stopping observations
- Merge next_trace_id() and next_decision_id() into a single
  allocate_attempt_identifiers() that atomically bumps the counter and
  returns (attempt_index, trace_id, decision_id)
- Use attempt_index for MockCx trace seeds and stopping observation
  timestamps instead of execution_counter
- Update observe_optimal_stopping() to accept attempt_index parameter
- Fix test assertions: per-extension LLR isolation means extension B
  now correctly triggers its own stopping threshold independently

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
